_note: Use admin.html to generate entries (recurs: freq weekly; freq monthly with week 1-4 or 'last'; or dates:[...] list). STILL-UNVERIFIED placeholders: trunk-or-treat-2026, veterans-day-2026, christmas-parade-2026. Everything else verified (sources: organizers, Facebook events, The Enterprise, county/town sites, visitpatrickcounty.org feed).

events.title: CANCELED: Kibler Valley River Run
events.description: The 43rd annual river run has been canceled for 2026. Drought conditions left the Pinnacles Hydro Plant unable to provide the water release the Dan River run depends on, per the Red Bank Ruritan Club. Organizers hope to bring it back in 2027.

events.title: Stuart Farmers' Market
events.description: Local produce, meats, eggs, baked goods, and crafts from Patrick County farms and makers. Every Friday morning through October.

events.title: Rotary on Tap: Pints for PCHS Teachers
events.description: Grab a pint with the Rotary Club of Stuart and support Patrick County High School teachers. A casual evening social — everyone welcome.

events.title: Third Thursday Craft Night at Stagecoach Coffee
events.description: Third Thursday make-and-take: craft a HOME porch leaner sign with an interchangeable letter O to swap out through the seasons.

events.title: Crochet and Chill 2.0
events.description: A laid-back crochet session at the Patrick County Library, hosted by the Blue Ridge Regional Library.

events.title: Youth Art Program at the Library
events.description: Karen Sigmon teaches kids about the artist Maria Martinez, then students create their own work of art. Free at the Patrick County Library, 116 W Blue Ridge St.

events.title: Swing Dance Night at The Arcadian
events.venue: The Arcadian Cafe & Ice Cream Parlour, 131 N Main St
events.description: Learn swing dance, then practice it — a beginner-friendly dance night at The Arcadian Cafe & Ice Cream Parlour. All experience levels welcome; no partner required.

events.title: Rural Everywhere: Chamber & Rotary Joint Meeting
events.description: The Patrick County Chamber of Commerce and Rotary Club of Stuart host a joint community event on connecting communities. Open to the public.

events.title: 44th Annual Beach Music Festival
events.description: Three days of beach music at Wayside Park, hosted by the Rotary Club of Stuart. The 2026 lineup featured The Embers, Jim Quick & Coastline, The Tams, and The Swingin' Medallions, with camping on site. Back for year 45 in 2027 — dates announced at beachfestival.com.

events.title: Hall Hammerheads Annual Golf Tournament
events.description: Annual golf tournament benefiting Hammerheads youth baseball — prizes, games, and lunch at Gordon Trent Golf Course in the Blue Ridge foothills.

events.title: Wayfest 2026 — Free Concert & Community Event
events.venue: Dominion Valley Park, 415 Dominion Valley Park Rd
events.description: A free concert and community celebration at Dominion Valley Park. Live music, food, and family fun — no ticket required.

events.title: Demolition Derby
events.description: Crashing, smashing, engine-revving fun as the Rotary Club of Stuart hosts the annual Demolition Derby. Concessions on site.

events.title: Homestead Artisan Series: Indigo Shibori
events.description: Hands-on indigo shibori dyeing workshop, part of the Homestead Artisan Series highlighting traditional and historic crafts and folk arts of the region.

events.title: Front Porch Fest 17
events.description: Four days of music and camping at Spirithaven Farm, headlined by Shinyribs with Chalk Dinosaur, Jon Stickley Trio, Big Daddy Love, Tae & The Neighborly, and two dozen more acts. Family-friendly, rain or shine, hosted by One Family Productions. Gates open 1 PM Thursday; 9 AM Friday through Sunday.

events.title: Patrick County Agricultural Fair
events.description: Fair week in Patrick County: livestock shows, exhibits, carnival rides, fair food, and small-town fun at Rotary Field, hosted by the Rotary Club of Stuart.

events.title: Apple Dumpling Festival
events.description: Fall festival in downtown Stuart with fresh apple dumplings, craft and food vendors, live music, and kids' activities.

events.title: Trunk or Treat
events.description: Safe family trick-or-treating from decorated trunks downtown. Costume contest and candy for the kids.

events.title: Veterans Day Ceremony
events.description: Community ceremony honoring Patrick County veterans, with color guard, guest speakers, and taps at the eleventh hour.

events.title: Stuart Christmas Parade
events.description: Floats, fire trucks, marching bands, and Santa himself rolling down Main Street to kick off the Christmas season.

events.description: Regular business meeting of the Patrick County Board of Supervisors in the third-floor board chamber. Open to the public.

events.title: Senior Citizens Group Gathering
events.description: Patrick County seniors gather for entertainment and a potluck lunch at the Hooker Building. All seniors welcome.

events.title: Stuart Evening Farmers' Market
events.description: Evening edition of the farmers market: fresh produce, eggs, baked goods, peanuts, and handcrafted items.

events.title: Patrick County School Board Meeting
events.description: Regular meeting of the Patrick County School Board. Open to the public.

events.title: Patrick County Food Bank Distribution
events.description: Food bank distribution day: Stuart 8:30-11 a.m. and 5-6:30 p.m.; Ararat 8-10 a.m.; Meadows of Dan 5:30 p.m.

events.title: Free Community Meal
events.description: Free community meal at Ross Harbour Methodist Church. Everyone welcome.

events.title: Community Food Truck at Fairystone VFD
events.description: Community food truck stop at the Fairystone Volunteer Fire Department.

events.title: Movie Night at Patrick Springs Christian Church
events.description: Family movie night with finger foods at Patrick Springs Christian Church.

events.title: Patrick County Planning Commission Meeting
events.venue: Patrick & Henry Community College, Community Room
events.description: Regular meeting of the Patrick County Planning Commission. Open to the public.

events.title: Appalachian Acoustic Open Jam
events.venue: Willis Gap Community Center, 144 The Hollow Rd
events.description: Weekly Appalachian acoustic open jam at the Willis Gap Community Center. Pickers and listeners both welcome.

events.title: American Legion Post 105 Meeting
events.venue: American Legion Post 105, 553 American Legion Rd
events.description: Monthly meeting of American Legion Post 105.

events.title: VFW Post 7800 Meal & Meeting
events.description: VFW Post 7800 monthly gathering: meal at 6 p.m., meeting at 7 p.m.

events.title: Veterans Memorial Honor Guard Meeting
events.venue: American Legion Post 105, 553 American Legion Rd
events.description: Monthly meeting of the Veterans Memorial Honor Guard at American Legion Post 105.

events.title: Salem Church Community Meal
events.description: Free community meal at Salem Church, first Sunday of every month. Everyone welcome.

events.title: Patrick Springs Ruritan Club Meeting
events.description: Monthly meeting of the Patrick Springs Ruritan Club.

events.title: Vesta Alzheimer's Support Group
events.description: Monthly lunch meeting of the Vesta Alzheimer's support group.

events.title: Patrick County Alzheimer's Group Meeting
events.description: Monthly meeting of the Patrick County Alzheimer's Group.

events.title: Raven Rock Community Meal
events.venue: Raven Rock Wesleyan Church, 1912 Raven Rock Rd
events.description: Free community meal at Raven Rock Wesleyan Church, fourth Wednesday of the month.

events.title: Golden Oldies Jam
events.venue: Willis Gap Community Center, 144 The Hollow Rd
events.description: Golden Oldies jam session at the Willis Gap Community Center, last Tuesday of every month.

events.title: We Impact Virginia: Community in Succession & Transition
events.description: A community conversation on succession and transition in rural Virginia, hosted at Reynolds Homestead.

events.title: Paddle Safety Class
events.description: Learn canoe and kayak safety basics with park staff at Fairy Stone State Park.

events.title: Paddle Safety Class
events.description: Learn canoe and kayak safety basics with park staff at Fairy Stone State Park.

events.title: The Sunset Market
events.description: An evening market in Meadows of Dan: local produce, makers, and food. Your evening, made local.

events.title: Kinnfolk at Chateau Morrisette
events.description: An afternoon of Celtic traditional tunes with Kinnfolk, paired with wine at Chateau Morrisette on the Blue Ridge Parkway near Meadows of Dan.

events.title: Milepost Music: The Lovely Mountaineers
events.description: Sunday-afternoon roots music at Mabry Mill on the Blue Ridge Parkway with the Lovely Mountaineers.

events.title: Milepost Music: Ashlee Watkins & Andrew Small
events.description: An afternoon of old-time and roots music at Mabry Mill on the Blue Ridge Parkway.

events.title: Nocturnal Neighbors: Insect Discovery Night
events.description: After-dark insect discovery program with park staff at Fairy Stone State Park.

events.title: Rural Assembly Everywhere (Virtual)
events.description: Virtual gathering of the Rural Assembly - join from anywhere in the county.

events.title: Senior Social: Christmas in July
events.description: Christmas-in-July themed senior social at the Patrick County Library.

events.title: Canoeing with Ghosts
events.description: An evening paddle with spooky park stories on Fairy Stone Lake. Reservations through the park.

events.title: Homestead Artisan Series: Painting with Grace
events.description: Guided painting workshop in the Homestead Artisan Series at Reynolds Homestead.

events.title: Yoga Flow with Ally Snead
events.description: Evening yoga flow on the grounds of Reynolds Homestead. All levels welcome.

events.title: Tuesday Music at the Coffee Break
events.description: Live acoustic music over morning coffee, hosted by the Patrick County Music Association.

events.title: Monday Market at Fairy Stone
events.description: Evening market at Fairy Stone State Park with local growers and makers.

events.title: Welcome Campfire
events.description: Friday-evening welcome campfire with park staff - s'mores-friendly family fun at Fairy Stone State Park.

events.title: Fairy Stone Hunt
events.description: Ranger-led hunt for the park's famous staurolite fairy-stone crosses. Offered most days this summer - check the park calendar.

events.title: C.S.I.: Creek Scene Investigation
events.description: Hands-on creek critter investigation with park staff at Fairy Stone State Park.

events.title: Stargazing: New Moon
events.description: New-moon stargazing under some of the darkest skies in the region, at Fairy Stone State Park.

events.title: Library Quilt Bee Group
events.description: Monthly quilt bee at the Patrick County Library. November and December sessions run 1-3 p.m.

events.title: Music at the Villa
events.venue: Villa Appalaccia Winery, 752 Rock Castle Gorge Rd
events.description: Live music on the patio at Villa Appalaccia Winery, just off the Blue Ridge Parkway near Mabry Mill.

events.title: Pizza at the Villa
events.venue: Villa Appalaccia Winery, 752 Rock Castle Gorge Rd
events.description: Sunday wood-fired pizza and wine afternoons at Villa Appalaccia, near Mabry Mill on the Parkway.

events.title: Heritage Sunday Tours: Pickin' on the Porch
events.description: Porch-culture edition of Heritage Sunday: tours of the 1843 homestead with old-time pickin' on the historic porch.

events.title: Little Historians: Story Time on the Porch
events.description: Story and hands-on activity for young children on the historic porch at Reynolds Homestead.

events.title: Bushels & Barrels Farm-to-Table Brunch
events.description: Farm-to-table brunch celebrating local growers and makers on the grounds of Reynolds Homestead.

events.title: College for Older Adults: Fall Session Begins
events.description: Fall session kickoff for the College for Older Adults - lifelong-learning classes for the 55+ crowd. Registration through Reynolds Homestead.
